summary.zh: 再认识 5 位中外伟人：孔子、蔡伦、伽利略、特斯拉、南丁格尔
summary.en: Meet 5 more great people from China and the world

greatFigures.fieldZh: 古代伟大的教育家、思想家

sections.zh: 孔子是中国古代伟大的老师和思想家，生活在两千五百多年前。
sections.en: Confucius was a great teacher and thinker in ancient China, more than 2,500 years ago.

sections.zh: 他相信每个人都应该学习，一生教过很多很多学生。
sections.en: He believed everyone should learn, and he taught many, many students in his life.

sections.zh: 他的思想影响了中国和世界，直到今天人们还在学习他的道理。
sections.en: His ideas shaped China and the world, and people still learn from him today.

sections.zh: 蔡伦是中国古代的发明家。
sections.en: Cai Lun was an inventor in ancient China.

sections.zh: 那时候写字的材料又贵又重，他想做出更好用的纸。
sections.en: Back then, writing materials were heavy and costly, so he wanted to make better paper.

sections.zh: 他改进了造纸的方法，让纸变得便宜好用，知识从此更容易传播。
sections.en: He improved papermaking so paper became cheap and easy to use, helping knowledge spread.

greatFigures.fieldZh: 用望远镜观察星空的科学家

sections.zh: 伽利略是意大利的科学家，被称为「现代科学之父」。
sections.en: Galileo was an Italian scientist, called the father of modern science.

sections.zh: 他用自己改进的望远镜，第一次仔细观察了月亮和木星。
sections.en: With a telescope he improved, he was the first to study the Moon and Jupiter closely.

sections.zh: 他发现行星都绕着太阳转，改变了人们看世界的方式。
sections.en: He found that planets circle the Sun, changing how people saw the world.

sections.zh: 特斯拉是一位了不起的发明家和工程师。
sections.en: Nikola Tesla was an amazing inventor and engineer.

sections.zh: 他研究电，想让电能送到很远很远的地方。
sections.en: He studied electricity and wanted to send power across long distances.

sections.zh: 他发明的交流电系统，今天还在为千家万户送去电力。
sections.en: His alternating-current system still powers homes everywhere today.

sections.zh: 南丁格尔是英国的护士，被人们称为「提灯女神」。
sections.en: Florence Nightingale was a British nurse, known as the Lady with the Lamp.

sections.zh: 在战争中，她夜里提着灯，细心照顾受伤的士兵。
sections.en: During a war, she carried a lamp at night to care for wounded soldiers.

sections.zh: 她让医院变得更干净、更安全，开创了现代护理事业。
sections.en: She made hospitals cleaner and safer, and founded modern nursing.
